text:
Codex 现在支持创建 Subagents

而且你还能切换窗口很便捷的跟踪每个Subagents 正在做的事情

 https://t.co/hbbnGvqLRA

Kimi 昨晚这篇论文很猛

尝试用 K2.5 对 Kimi 这篇论文进行可视化解释。 https://t.co/M6W3xpBKjx

Never been a better time to study the humanities:
1) LLMs are trained on the cultural history of all humans, knowing that helps you use them
2) The humanities gives us context in this odd moment in history
3) Books & stuff are good
Wrote this 3 years ago: https://t.co/7WrT6Jbhyw

4) The job market is going to change rapidly, general knowledge may be useful
5) And for those who are just interested in remaking the world, I would note that you can't be a philosopher king without knowing philosophy (and, no, a bunch of modern writings on Stoicism don't count)

Axiom: The form of AI that we ended up with is deeply weird in ways that we don't fully get. Attempts to pretend AI is less weird & apply it like a standard IT product will inevitably result in less useful & far less reliable AI implementations than those that embrace weirdness.
RT @icreatelife: The coolest use-case for AI animation I found of new Nano Banana 2 is that you can screenshot a map and ask it to generate…
